across.clue: If someone is hesitant, then they are not sure or are slow to act or speak.
An embassy is the office of an ambassador in a foreign country.
A priority is something that is more important than other things.
A parachute is a device that helps people and things fall to the ground safely.
When something is distinctive, it has a special quality, character, or appearance that is different and easy to recognize.
A fireplace is a structure in a room where a fire can be made.
An epidemic is an outbreak of a disease that spreads quickly.
A pension is a regular payment to a retired person.
A committee is a group of people who meet together to make decisions.

down.clue: When something is elaborate, it contains a lot of details.
A crisis is a difficult time when things are going to either get worse or better.
a quantity of something that is a part or share of the whole.
To infect someone means to give them an illness.
If someone is articulate, he or she has the ability to express ideas clearly and effectively.
To disseminate information or knowledge means to distribute it.
A reflection is an image that is seen in a mirror or other shiny surface.
a share of the profits of a company paid once or twice a year to the people who own the company's shares.
A charitable organization aims to help people.
A bulletin is a news report about very recent and important events.
